response.justification: Candidate has strong geospatial/GIS background through GISCollective and Green Map, plus systems-level experience with DLang at Sociomantic handling high-throughput pipelines. However, the role explicitly requires modern C++ or Rust, and the resume shows only dated C/C++ work at National Instruments (2000-2001) and no Rust. Recent experience is predominantly TypeScript/Node.js full-stack, which is a significant gap from the systems-programming focus of routing tile pipelines. Worth a screening call to probe transferability of DLang systems experience to C++/Rust.
strengths: Direct geospatial/GIS domain experience via GISCollective and Open Green Map
High-throughput, low-latency systems work at Sociomantic (async I/O, fibers, caching)
Polyglot systems-language background (DLang) with testing/TDD discipline
concerns: No demonstrated modern C++ experience; C/C++ work is ~25 years old
Recent career trajectory is web/full-stack, not systems or data pipelines
